title: PerfectHeal
description: PerfectHeal suggests when and in what order to use items for restoring health and saturation.
body:
**Recently, I released a mod that simplifies movement in the game.**
**Details:** https://modrinth.com/mod/better-movement-(fabric)


**PerfectHeal** is a mod that simplifies the **healing** process and helps maintain high **saturation** levels.

###  **Item Recommendations:**
Displays on-screen prompts with item icons, advising when to use healing potions, golden or enchanted golden apples, as well as food from your hotbar.

### **Cooldown Management:**
You can customize cooldowns for golden and enchanted golden apples. This is useful if you know the cooldown times for these items on a specific server—you can set them in the mod’s menu to avoid recommendations when these items are unavailable.

### **In-Game Customization Menu:**
The mod features a menu where you can enable or disable golden apple recommendations for maintaining saturation, as well as activate colored borders for all items to increase visibility on the screen.

### **Compatibility:**
This mod currently works only with Fabric and requires the use of Cloth Config.
